task_completion.description: Place a text box in the center of the page containing the required quote
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box is visible in the center of the page, containing the exact quote: 'The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.'

task_completion.visual_evidence: The quote text inside the text box is italicized and centered. The text box has a solid white background (fill) and a visible double-line or thick border.

task_completion.description: Ensure the body text flows around the text box using square or tight wrapping
task_completion.visual_evidence: The two-column body text wraps neatly around the edges of the text box, rather than being covered by it or appearing strictly above/below it inline.

task_completion.visual_evidence: The word processor's title bar shows 'Alumni_Feature_Formatted.docx', or a Save As dialog is visible saving the file with this name in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The layout was achieved using actual formatting tools rather than manual spacing.
